get.summary: Fetch competitive graph summary - authenticate for full access
get.description:
Competitive Graph — public summary + authenticated full access.

Without auth: returns aggregate stats only (total nodes, sectors, avg moat).
With X-API-KEY or X-SESSION: returns full graph with nodes, edges, hub competitors.
With ?company=Name: returns subgraph centered on that company (auth required).

get.summary: Market saturation report for a sector from Competitive Graph
get.description:
Competitive Graph 2.0 — Market Share & Saturation Report.

Returns a market intelligence report for a sector based on
all companies analyzed by Intelica stored in the Competitive Graph.

Examples:
- /graph/market-share/ai
- /graph/market-share/fintech
- /graph/market-share/healthcare
- /graph/market-share/saas
- /graph/market-share/defense
- /graph/market-share/logistics

post.summary: Send A2A protocol message and receive competitive analysis
post.description:
A2A Protocol — message/send endpoint.
Compatible con LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Google ADK.
Acepta mensajes A2A y retorna análisis competitivo estructurado.
Modo gratuito para descubrimiento — análisis básico sin pago.

get.summary: Payment challenge for /intel - x402 discovery probe
get.description: Returns x402 payment challenge for agent discovery and x402scan indexing.

post.summary: Analyze competitor URL or text - returns structured intelligen
post.description: Single competitive intelligence analysis — $0.05 USDC via x402 or X-SESSION for plan holders.

get.summary: Get a free trial API key - 1.00 USDC credit, no wallet required
get.description: Issues a free trial API key with $1.00 USDC credit (20 standard calls). One per IP. Valid 7 days.

get.summary: Payment challenge for /batch - x402 discovery probe
get.description: Returns x402 payment challenge for agent discovery and x402scan indexing.

post.summary: Analyze up to ten competitors in parallel via x402 payment
post.description: Batch competitive intelligence — up to 10 items for 0.20 USDC via x402, X-SESSION, or X-API-KEY.

get.summary: Demo endpoint info
get.description: Returns demo endpoint info — free analysis with 300 char limit.

post.summary: Analyze competitor text free - demo limited to 300 characters
post.description: Free demo — 300 char text limit, no URL fetching. 3 calls per IP per hour.

post.summary: Activate a time-based access plan with USDC payment on Solana
post.description: Verifica pago USDC en Solana via Helius y activa sesión de acceso.

get.summary: Check remaining reports and expiry for a session
get.description: Retorna el estado actual de una sesión de acceso.

post.summary: Helius webhook - receives USDC payment notifications
post.description: Recibe notificaciones de Helius cuando llega USDC a la wallet de Intelica.

post.summary: Create an API key - load USDC balance for agent use without per
post.description: Crea una API key con saldo USDC. Los agentes usan X-API-KEY header en lugar de wallet por call.

get.summary: Check API key balance and usage
get.description: Verifica el saldo y uso de una API key.

post.summary: Create a pending payment - returns payment_id for polling
post.description: Crea un pago pendiente. La página hace polling hasta que Helius confirme.

get.summary: Poll payment status - returns session_id when confirmed
get.description: Polling endpoint. La página llama esto cada 5 segundos hasta recibir session_id.

get.summary: x402 payment setup guide for AI agents and their developers
get.description:
Structured onboarding for AI agents that received HTTP 402 from Intelica.

This endpoint is designed to be called by agents that don't know how to pay x402.
The agent should include this response in its reply to the user/developer so they
can set up x402 payments and unlock competitive intelligence.

post.description: Register an autonomous market surveillance subscription.

get.description: Get active Pulse subscriptions and alert history for a session.
